creator: rb@nugman.de
text:
Hm, very strange.
The latest upgrade log is from April 28th. It seems that the upgrade back then failed because of an invalid SSL certificate on Crashplan's download site, but this is probably not related to the recent events.

I took a look at the logs but found no evidence that the automatic upgrade was started after the subscription upgrade, although an upgrade thread seems to be running (named service.upgrade.DownloadManager).
Is there a way to trigger the upgrade manually?
